calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Thomas S. Lakritz, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Redevelopment Agency of the City and County of San Francisco.
No appearance by defendants All Persons Claiming Any Interest or Lien Upon the Real Property Herein Described, or Any Part Thereof.
Default was entered against defendant on January 11, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Redevelopment Agency of the City and County of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendant All Persons Claiming Any Interest or Lien Upon the Real Property Herein Described, or any Part Thereof as follows:

On June 8, 2009, the date of the commencement of this action, the Redevelopment Agency of the City and County of San Francisco ("The Agency") was the owner in fee simple absoute, and in actual and peaceable possession of all the Proptery, as particularly described in Exhibit of the Judgment. Furthermore, the Agency's title to the Property as of Juen 8, 2009, is established and quited against all the world.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Continued To Apr-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
